content: You are an Akamai Cloud Solutions Architect. Be concise.
My name is Du'An and I run a GPU cluster in us-sea.
Hello Du'An! How can I assist you with your GPU cluster in us-sea? Do you need help with optimization, scaling, security, or any specific issues?
I work for Akamai. My favorite programming language is Python.

Great to know, Du'An! How can my expertise in Python and Akamai solutions support your needs? Are you looking to integrate Python scripts with Akamai services, optimize your GPU cluster, or address any specific challenges?
